subcodes.first_line: Verily Thou, O my God, Thy mercy hath preceded all else, Thy bounty hath been perfected, and Thy power hath encompassed all things, and thus didst Thou create [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انک انت یا الهی سبقت رحمتک و کملت موهبتک و احاطت قدرتک کل الاشیاء فخلقت
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @The Holy Spirit
